errors.description: The sealed audit archive root hash is missing, malformed, or does not verify.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny WORM immutable storage planning until the sealed archive root hash is verified

errors.description: The evidence record chain is missing, malformed, or not bound to the sealed audit archive.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny WORM immutable storage planning until evidence record continuity is verified

errors.description: The immutable storage manifest entries are reordered or outside the required append-only order.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny WORM immutable storage planning when manifest ordering is ambiguous

errors.description: A storage plan already exists for the sealed archive ID.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny duplicate WORM immutable storage plans for the same sealed archive

errors.description: The storage output path is mutable or not canonical content-addressed local-only WORM notation.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny WORM immutable storage planning when output paths are mutable

errors.description: The WORM immutable storage manifest is malformed or hash verification failed.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny WORM immutable storage planning until the hash-only manifest verifies

errors.description: The WORM immutable storage diagnostics contain unsafe or unredacted material.
errors.fail_closed_reason: deny WORM immutable storage planning when diagnostics are not redacted
